title: February 2026 Lush Kitchen XL Unboxing
caption:
February 2026 Kitchen XL unboxing, throwback to when that cheeky 2019 Valentine's line first dropped 💕🎁 
Happy Blooming Body Lotion: Valentine's exclusive florals, pure springtime romance 🌸💕 
Aubergine Bath Bomb: OG will remember this iconic cheeky design from 2019 🍆✨ 
Keep it Fluffy Bubble Bar: Cloud-like bubbles that Lush fans absolutely live for ☁️🫧 
Peachy Soap: The companion to Aubergine, fruity and playful as ever 🍑🧼 
Sex in the Shower Emoitbomb: Classic scent in new format, cult favourite vibes 💋🚿 
Two Hearts Shower Gel: Rose florals bringing all the Valentine's nostalgia 💕🌹 
Jasmine Dream Bath Melt: Jasmine heritage meets luxurious moisturising 🌺✨

nostalgiaNotes.title: Happy Blooming body lotion
nostalgiaNotes.body: A Valentine's Kitchen exclusive evoking the romantic, rosy warmth fans associate with special Lush seasonal drops

nostalgiaNotes.title: Happy Blooming body lotion
nostalgiaNotes.body: Released as part of the February 2026 Lush Kitchen XL Valentine's subscription box

nostalgiaNotes.title: Happy Blooming body lotion
nostalgiaNotes.body: Likely references the classic Rose Jam scent family, a longtime Valentine's season favourite

nostalgiaNotes.title: Aubergine bath bomb
nostalgiaNotes.body: Floral body lotions are a beloved Lush staple, and a Valentine's seasonal release always carries a sense of occasion for subscribers

nostalgiaNotes.title: Aubergine bath bomb
nostalgiaNotes.body: Released as part of the February 2026 Lush Kitchen XL Valentine's subscription box

nostalgiaNotes.title: Keep it fluffy bubble bar
nostalgiaNotes.body: Peachy has a cheeky Valentine's legacy stretching back to 2019, making it a fan-favourite returning seasonal treat

nostalgiaNotes.title: Keep it fluffy bubble bar
nostalgiaNotes.body: The Peachy concept originated in Lush's 2019 Valentine's line alongside the Aubergine bath bomb, becoming one of the most talked-about seasonal releases of that year

nostalgiaNotes.title: Keep it fluffy bubble bar
nostalgiaNotes.body: Companion piece to the iconic Aubergine bath bomb from the 2019 Valentine's collection

nostalgiaNotes.title: Peachy soap
nostalgiaNotes.body: Jasmine-scented Lush products carry a rich heritage, and bath melts are treasured for their deeply moisturising, indulgent soak

nostalgiaNotes.title: Peachy soap
nostalgiaNotes.body: Released as part of the February 2026 Lush Kitchen XL Valentine's subscription box

nostalgiaNotes.title: Sex in the Shower Emoitbomb
nostalgiaNotes.body: Sex in the Shower is a long-running Lush product with a devoted following, and seeing it appear in new formats excites loyal fans

nostalgiaNotes.title: Sex in the Shower Emoitbomb
nostalgiaNotes.body: Released as part of the February 2026 Lush Kitchen XL Valentine's subscription box; the Emoitbomb format combines emollient oils with an effervescent bomb for use in the shower

nostalgiaNotes.title: Sex in the Shower Emoitbomb
nostalgiaNotes.body: Based on the classic Sex in the Shower solid perfume and body care range

nostalgiaNotes.title: Two Heart shower gel
nostalgiaNotes.body: A cult favourite from Lush's cheeky 2019 Valentine's line, the Aubergine bath bomb became instantly iconic for its phallic design and its uncanny recreation of that beloved Lush shop floor smell

nostalgiaNotes.title: Two Heart shower gel
nostalgiaNotes.body: First released as part of Lush's 2019 Valentine's collection alongside the Peachy bath bomb; the scent is '29 High Street', designed to replicate the signature smell of a Lush store

nostalgiaNotes.title: Two Heart shower gel
nostalgiaNotes.body: Companion to the Peachy bath bomb from the 2019 Valentine's line; shares the 29 High Street scent with other products in that range

nostalgiaNotes.title: Jasmine Dream bath melt
nostalgiaNotes.body: Fluffy, cloud-like bubble bars are a Lush staple that fans adore for their generous mountains of bubbles and lingering scent

nostalgiaNotes.title: Jasmine Dream bath melt
nostalgiaNotes.body: Released as part of the February 2026 Lush Kitchen XL Valentine's subscription box

products.name: Happy Blooming body lotion
products.description: A blooming floral body lotion designed for Valentine's season, leaving skin soft and delicately scented with springlike florals.
products.nostalgiaNote: A Valentine's Kitchen exclusive evoking the romantic, rosy warmth fans associate with special Lush seasonal drops

products.name: Aubergine bath bomb
products.description: The famously cheeky aubergine — shaped bath bomb that smells exactly like walking into a Lush shop — the scent is '29 High Street', crafted to capture that iconic store — floor fragrance. Contains fresh aubergine for its skin — loving vitamins and minerals.
products.nostalgiaNote: Floral body lotions are a beloved Lush staple, and a Valentine's seasonal release always carries a sense of occasion for subscribers

products.name: Keep it fluffy bubble bar
products.description: A generously bubbly bubble bar that lives up to its name, creating a fluffy, pillowy bath full of soft, skin — softening bubbles with a delightful lingering fragrance.
products.nostalgiaNote: Peachy has a cheeky Valentine's legacy stretching back to 2019, making it a fan-favourite returning seasonal treat

products.name: Peachy soap
products.description: A cheeky, peachy — shaped soap that's equal parts playful and practical, with a sweet fruity scent that makes it a perennial Valentine's favourite.
products.nostalgiaNote: Jasmine-scented Lush products carry a rich heritage, and bath melts are treasured for their deeply moisturising, indulgent soak

products.name: Sex in the Shower Emoitbomb
products.description: An effervescent shower Emoitbomb inspired by the beloved Sex in the Shower scent — a warm, sensual blend perfect for a Valentine's indulgence, leaving skin moisturised and lightly fragranced.
products.nostalgiaNote: Sex in the Shower is a long-running Lush product with a devoted following, and seeing it appear in new formats excites loyal fans

products.name: Two Heart shower gel
products.description: A romantically scented shower gel shaped around the Valentine's season, delivering soft floral rose notes to leave skin feeling cleansed and sweetly fragranced.
products.nostalgiaNote: A cult favourite from Lush's cheeky 2019 Valentine's line, the Aubergine bath bomb became instantly iconic for its phallic design and its uncanny recreation of that beloved Lush shop floor smell

products.name: Jasmine Dream bath melt
products.description: A luxuriously moisturising bath melt infused with dreamy jasmine florals, designed to soften skin and fill the bathroom with an intoxicating, romantic scent.
products.nostalgiaNote: Fluffy, cloud-like bubble bars are a Lush staple that fans adore for their generous mountains of bubbles and lingering scent
